name: Call of Tanks
author: Poki
description: Call of Tanks is a tower defense game created by Beedo Games. In this game, your objective is to deploy different types of tanks and destroy the enemy base. There are many types of tanks that have a variety of offensive and defensive abilities. Try experimenting with different tactics, and choose the right tank at the appropriate time to crush your opponents. You can also upgrade your tanks, defenses, and bases to make your army an unstoppable force. Go ahead and take care of all of the enemy bases before their units come and get you! Controls: Deploy tank - Drag and drop a unit from the bottom panel Navigate - Use the arrow keys or click on the mini map Change camera angle - Right mouse button Zoom in/out - Mouse wheel About the creator: Call of Tanks is created by Beedo Games. Play their other action-packed strategy games on Poki: Base Defense , Blocky Snakes , Clash Of Armour , Clash of Skulls , Clash of Tanks , dark-boy, Jelly Sokoban , Mafia Wars , Swingers , and Tanko.io
